user.title: EEC app
user.description: Enter only your EcoFlow Cloud API keys. Configure prices, weather, test mode and devices later via Configure.

error.invalid_json: One of the JSON fields is invalid.
error.cannot_connect: The connection could not be verified. Check the API settings, serial number, device id or IP address.
error.ecoflow_auth_failed: The EcoFlow API keys could not be validated. Check access key, secret key and region host.
error.no_importable_devices: No new devices were found to import.

init.title: Configure EEC app - start with devices

general.title: Basic settings
general.description: Choose only what the automatic flow needs: price source, surcharge, weather city and test mode.

advanced.title: Technical settings
advanced.description: Only needed for other API hosts, a custom price URL, SMA Cloud or new EcoFlow API keys.

add_device.title: Add manually
add_device.description: Use this only when import does not work. The app checks the connection before saving the device.

import_ecoflow.title: Import EcoFlow devices
import_ecoflow.description: The app reads devices from EcoFlow Cloud. Then choose the right type for each device.

import_homewizard.title: Import HomeWizard from Home Assistant
import_homewizard.description: Use existing Home Assistant HomeWizard devices as P1/grid meter or solar source. No extra local meter setup is needed.

import_ecoflow_configure.title: Configure EcoFlow device

import_ecoflow_powerstream.title: PowerStream settings
import_ecoflow_powerstream.description: Link this PowerStream to the battery it may manage. This is used for advice, sliders and automatic control.

import_ecoflow_battery.title: Delta solar panels
import_ecoflow_battery.description: Enter the total panel capacity in Wp for this Delta only and choose how much battery should always be kept. Panel example: three panels with 1100 Wp together = 1100. Keep 0 when this Delta has no direct panels. The reserve prevents control from discharging this Delta further.

data.direct_solar_wp: Total solar panels on this Delta (Wp)

import_ecoflow_smart_plug.title: Smart Plug settings
import_ecoflow_smart_plug.description: Choose which battery this Smart Plug may charge during solar surplus or low prices.

edit_device.title: Edit device
edit_device.description: Change the name, link or limits of an existing device.

device_delta_pro.title: Add Delta Pro
device_delta_pro.description: Does this Delta have direct panels? Enter the total Wp. Keep 0 when this Delta has no direct panels. Also choose how much battery should always be kept; default is 20%.

data.name: Friendly name
data.direct_solar_wp: Total solar panels on this Delta (Wp)

device_delta_pro_3.title: Add Delta Pro 3
device_delta_pro_3.description: Does this Delta have direct panels? Enter the total Wp. Keep 0 when this Delta has no direct panels. Also choose how much battery should always be kept; default is 20%.

data.name: Friendly name
data.direct_solar_wp: Total solar panels on this Delta (Wp)

edit_batteries.title: Edit battery
edit_batteries.description: For direct panels, enter the total Wp for this Delta only. Also choose how much battery should always be kept as reserve.

data.name: Friendly name
data.direct_solar_wp: Total solar panels on this Delta (Wp)
